title: phyllanthus arenarius
intro: Phyllanthus arenarius, also known as the sea phyllanthus or sea oxeye daisy, is a succulent shrub native to the Mediterranean region and tropical Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and small, rounded leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus arenarius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney problems, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
